title: PARTYRAMA.CO.UK Assorted Handheld Christmas Water Game
features: How many hoops can you get on the two rods? Challenge your friends and family to see who can get the most on! Simply press the button down and try to hook the hoops.
Approx size: 13.6cm x 6.8cm / 5.4 in x 2.7 in
Sold in assorted colours. Colour chosen at random.
description: Product description Sold: Single Approx size: 13.6cm x 6.8cm / 5.4 in x 2.7 in Material: Plastic Safety Warning Keep away from naked flame
